description_long: This object is a large, rectangular stone block with a smooth, uniform surface and a rich, reddish-brown coloration. The block features sharp, clean edges and a flat top, making it suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. One side of the block is open, forming a hollow cavity that extends deep into the structure, while the other sides are solid and unbroken. The interior cavity is darker, suggesting depth and a possible use as a shelter or cover. The exterior finish is consistent, with no visible chips, cracks, or weathering, indicating it is either new or well-maintained. There are no visible markings, engravings, or decorative elements on any surface.
description: A large, reddish-brown rectangular stone block with a smooth surface and a hollow cavity on one side. The block is solid on three sides and open on the fourth, with clean, sharp edges.
description_view_0: A solid, flat face of the stone block with no visible openings or features.
description_view_1: The open side of the block, revealing a deep, dark hollow cavity inside.
description_view_2: Another solid, flat face similar to view 0, with no visible openings.
description_view_3: A broad, uninterrupted face with a slight highlight, showing the block's smooth surface.
attribute_installation_method: set in place on a level surface, possibly with a concrete or sand base
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering or erosion; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained.
